title: UnityBuildConfig
description: Schema for Unity CI/CD build configuration files used with unity-build-workflows.

projectName.description: Internal identifier for this project. Used in artifact names and workflow job names.

companyName.description: Company name as it appears in Unity Player Settings.

productName.description: Product name as it appears in Unity Player Settings and on-device.

bundleVersion.description: Semantic version string (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Used as the player-facing version.

buildNumberStrategy.description: How the build number is derived. 'github_run_number' uses $GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER, 'timestamp' uses YYYYMMDDHHmm, 'manual' requires BUILD_NUMBER env var.

outputDirectory.description: Relative path inside the workspace where build artifacts are written.

scenes.description: Ordered list of scene paths (relative to project root) included in the build.

scriptingBackend.description: Unity scripting backend. IL2CPP is required for iOS and recommended for release builds.

developmentBuild.description: Enable Unity development build flag. Must be false for production environments.

allowDebugging.description: Attach script debugger. Only valid when developmentBuild is true. Must be false for production.

connectProfiler.description: Allow Unity Profiler to connect to this build.

deepProfiling.description: Enable deep profiling support (higher memory overhead).

cleanBuildCache.description: Delete the Unity Library/ cache before building. Slower but avoids stale cache issues.

runTests.description: Whether to run Unity Test Runner (EditMode and PlayMode) before the build step.

enabled.description: Whether Addressables are used in this project.

profile.description: Addressables build profile name (must match a profile defined in AddressableAssetSettings).

buildRemoteCatalog.description: Build and upload the remote content catalog.

applicationId.description: Android application ID (package name), e.g. com.company.game.

buildAppBundle.description: Build an Android App Bundle (.aab) instead of an APK. Required for Play Store distribution.

architecture.description: CPU architecture(s) to include in the build.

keystoreMode.description: Signing mode. 'debug' uses Android debug keystore, 'custom' requires KEYSTORE_* secrets.

symbolExport.description: Symbol export level for crash reporting tools.

iOS.description: Canonical iOS platform configuration block. No secrets — all signing credentials live in GitHub secrets.

ios.description: Deprecated: use 'iOS' key. Accepted for backward compatibility with existing configs.

outputName.description: Name of the output executable (without .exe extension).

compressOutput.description: Zip the output directory before uploading as an artifact.

decompressionFallback.description: Include decompression fallback for servers that cannot serve Brotli/Gzip content-encoding.

dataCaching.description: Enable IndexedDB caching of WebGL data files.

memorySize.description: Initial WASM heap size in MB.

outputName.description: Name of the WebGL output folder.

gates.description: Build quality gates that can block promotion or fail the pipeline.

maxBuildSizeMB.description: Hard limit on build artifact size in MB. Build fails if exceeded.

warnBuildSizeIncreasePct.description: Percentage increase in build size vs. baseline that triggers a warning annotation.

failBuildSizeIncreasePct.description: Percentage increase in build size vs. baseline that fails the build.

failOnWarnings.description: Treat Unity compiler warnings as errors and fail the build.

requiredValidationRules.description: List of validation rules that must pass before the build proceeds.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs attached to the build. Included in build manifests and notifications.

hooks.description: Shell hook scripts invoked at lifecycle events.

preBuild.description: Ordered list of hook identifiers (script names under scripts/hooks/) to run before the build.

postBuild.description: Ordered list of hook identifiers to run after a successful build.

iosBlock.description: iOS platform configuration shared by canonical 'iOS' and deprecated 'ios' keys. No secrets.

bundleIdentifier.description: Reverse-DNS iOS bundle identifier, e.g. com.company.game.

buildNumber.description: CFBundleVersion build number — numeric string. If omitted, derived from buildNumberStrategy.

marketingVersion.description: CFBundleShortVersionString marketing version in MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH semver format.

sdkVersion.description: Xcode SDK target. 'iphoneos' for device/App Store builds; 'iphonesimulator' for simulator builds.

targetOSVersion.description: Minimum iOS deployment target (e.g. '14.0', '15.0'). Must be 14.0 or higher.

architecture.description: CPU architecture. 'ARM64' for modern devices; 'Universal' includes ARM64 + x86_64 for simulators.

xcodeVersion.description: Xcode version required to build this project (e.g. '15.2', '16.0'). Informational — used for runner selection.

automaticSigning.description: Legacy field: use Xcode automatic signing. Prefer signingStyle instead.

signingStyle.description: Code signing style. 'manual' requires provisioningProfileSpecifier + codeSignIdentity; 'automatic' delegates to Xcode.

developmentTeam.description: Apple Developer Team ID (10-character uppercase alphanumeric string). Legacy alias for developmentTeamId.

developmentTeamId.description: Apple Developer Team ID (10-character uppercase alphanumeric string).

provisioningProfileSpecifier.description: Provisioning profile name or UUID. Required when signingStyle is 'manual'. The actual profile is supplied via IOS_PROVISIONING_PROFILE_BASE64 secret.

codeSignIdentity.description: Code signing identity string (e.g. 'iPhone Distribution'). Required when signingStyle is 'manual'.

exportMethod.description: IPA export method. 'app-store' and 'app-store-connect' are equivalent for App Store/TestFlight distribution.

enableBitcode.description: Enable Bitcode in the Xcode archive. Deprecated by Apple in Xcode 14+; keep false for modern toolchains.

generateSymbols.description: Generate dSYM symbol files alongside the IPA for crash reporting.

uploadSymbols.description: Upload dSYM files to App Store Connect alongside the IPA. Effective only when uploadToTestFlight is true.

uploadToTestFlight.description: Request that the workflow upload the IPA to TestFlight. The actual upload is gated by the workflow deploy step and App Store Connect secrets.

generateXcodeProjectOnly.description: Stop after generating the Xcode project, without building the IPA. Useful for local Xcode testing.
